title: Warm Irish Porridge
description: A comforting, diabetic-friendly breakfast featuring Irish porridge oats and double-rise bread. This pungent, aerated dish is perfect for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Irish Porridge Oats
ingredients.notes: Rolled oats, preferably with a low glycemic index

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use filtered water to reduce mineral intake

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Unrefined, plain salt for added flavor

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Grated, fresh ginger for aroma and taste

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Unrefined, plain sugar for balanced sweetness

ingredients.name: Double-Rise Bread
ingredients.notes: Day-old, gluten-free bread for added texture

instructions: Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add 1 cup of Irish Porridge Oats and reduce heat to medium.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until oats are well combined with water.
Add 1/8 tsp of salt and 1/4 tsp of grated ginger.
Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add 1 tsp of unrefined sugar and stir to combine.
Transfer cooked oats to a serving bowl.
Add 2 slices of day-old double-rise bread to the oats.
Top with 2 tbsp of unsalted, low-fat butter.
